reviews.review_description: A great return to an old favourite, however, score does not reset after Game Over.  It soon becomes very hectic after stage 4.
Great game for "older" gamers like me (just turned 50). Brought me right back to the 80s and I remembered exactly how to play. I only wish it had more than 3 lives. Lots of fun!

The game is ok on my Quest 3, but because I am familiar with the Oculus Go version I can't give this version too high a rating. The Go version was absolutely awesome, from the rapid fire to how you controlled the spaceship with the controller. The music was also better IMO. Maybe it's just me, but this version seems like a step back, and I was hoping it would be at least as good as the Go version. 

Hope the dev is reading this.. I would have written email instead but there is no contact info I could find. Please make a port of the Go version as well, as I would be willing to buy it too.
